_meta.notes: Source of truth for all resume content. Add new bullets here as you recall more work. The app selects and filters this pool per JD — nothing here appears on a resume unless selected.

summary_variants.text: Backend and infrastructure engineer with experience building distributed systems, automating deployment pipelines, and modernizing platform infrastructure at enterprise scale. Track record of reducing operational overhead through automation and owning critical systems across multi-region production environments at Nomura and Spotify.

Backend and infrastructure engineer with hands-on experience designing and operating large-scale distributed caching systems using Valkey and Redis. Track record of end-to-end ownership across in-memory datastore architecture, multi-region deployment, and production reliability at enterprise scale. Experienced in Go, Python, and Kubernetes, with a focus on high-availability, observability, and infrastructure automation.

Infrastructure and platform engineer with experience building and operating cloud-native systems at enterprise scale. Deep hands-on background in Go, AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform, and Ansible, with a track record of end-to-end ownership across CI/CD pipelines, deployment automation, and distributed infrastructure. Early adopter of AI tooling in engineering workflows.

bullets.title: Software Engineer
bullets.label: Gap Hedger — Risk Management Tool
bullets.text: Built a real-time risk management platform in Python and Vite/TypeScript for the Structured Desk, which manages hundreds of millions of dollars in client exposure. Consumed live position data from Euclid (internal risk system) via Solace messaging and options data from an external publisher to calculate scenario headroom, surface low and negative headroom alerts, and generate unwind recommendations — enabling the desk to proactively manage risk and reduce hedging costs. Deployed on Kubernetes.

bullets.title: Software Engineer
bullets.label: Multi-Region Distributed Caching
bullets.text: Architected and implemented a large-scale distributed caching layer in Go and C#/.NET using Valkey (Redis-compatible) with consistent hashing and data sharding across New York and Tokyo production environments. Designed the cluster topology, sharding strategy, and failover behavior, achieving a 99.99% cache hit rate across 4.1M+ requests with continuous 24/7 uptime requirements.

bullets.title: Software Engineer
bullets.label: Platform Modernization
bullets.text: Built Go-based authentication microservices with clean API contracts and unit test coverage, authored Helm charts and Dockerfiles for containerized deployment on a Rancher Kubernetes cluster, and managed cloud infrastructure provisioning across AWS and GCP using Terraform and Ansible — owning the full lifecycle from service design through production rollout.

bullets.title: Software Engineer
bullets.label: Deployment Pipeline Overhaul
bullets.text: Redesigned the end-to-end CI/CD pipeline using Ansible, GitLab CI, Jenkins, and Terraform, reducing deployment time from 6–8 hours to ~1.5 hours (~80% reduction) across hundreds of production services. Introduced symlink-based parallel deployment for near-zero downtime rollouts across Linux and Windows infrastructure.

bullets.title: Software Engineer
bullets.label: Release Automation + AI Tooling
bullets.text: Automated the full release management pipeline using Ansible, Python, and Terraform, eliminating a fully manual process involving artifact downloads, network drive transfers, and manual configuration across distributed infrastructure. Extended with AI tooling as one of the earliest adopters at the firm, with a pragmatic view of where automation creates leverage versus introducing risk.

bullets.title: Software Engineer
bullets.label: Platform Feature Development
bullets.text: Designed a shared runtime configuration service in C#/.NET using the Chain of Responsibility pattern, providing composable hierarchical resolution of settings across process, group, and host segment boundaries — a shared capability consumed by multiple engineering teams.

bullets.title: Software Engineer
bullets.label: KDB Migration
bullets.text: Migrated stress test result data from a relational SQL database to KDB using C#/.NET, managing schema translation, validation, and zero-downtime cutover for a critical downstream risk system, improving query performance and storage efficiency.

bullets.title: Software Engineer Apprentice
bullets.label: Backend Data Service
bullets.text: Built a Java/gRPC backend service on GCP Bigtable processing 30TB of user data, enabling leaderboard ranking sharing across 6,600+ listeners and ~3,500 artists. Designed the service API and data access layer for low-latency reads at scale, ensuring reliable delivery of ranking data under concurrent load.

bullets.title: Software Engineer Apprentice
bullets.label: Live Artist Rooms
bullets.text: Optimized Live Artist Rooms using Java, gRPC, and CloudSQL, enabling 40+ artists to test a revenue-generating feature that generated $18,000+ in gross sales volume. Identified and resolved backend bottlenecks impacting session stability, improving reliability for real-time artist-fan interactions.

bullets.title: Software Engineer Apprentice
bullets.label: Fan Access & Scheduling
bullets.text: Enhanced the fan access scheduling flow in Scala and Java using QuickSilver, resulting in 95%+ of attendees rating the feature positively. Collaborated cross-functionally with product and ops to understand scheduling edge cases and deliver a robust, production-ready solution.

bullets.title: Software Engineer Apprentice
bullets.label: RSVP Management
bullets.text: Updated RSVP data management for 15,000+ fan accounts via Java/gRPC service methods with CloudSQL persistence and JUnit test coverage. Ensured data consistency and correctness across concurrent write paths, with thorough unit and integration testing to support confident production rollout.

education.institution: City University of New York, Lehman College
